title: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation – Assistant Manager – 123 Posts
applyMode: Online only (through IBPS portal via Stree Nidhi website)
shortInfo: Stree Nidhi Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 123 vacancies for Assistant Manager posts. Candidates can apply online only from 09.05.2026 to 29.05.2026 through Stree Nidhi website streenidhi.telangana.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: Stree Nidhi Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 123 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Stree Nidhi Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 123 vacancies for Assistant Manager posts. Candidates can apply online only from 09.05.2026 to 29.05.2026 through Stree Nidhi website streenidhi.telangana.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd. (Apex Credit Society, Telangana State)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (through IBPS portal via Stree Nidhi website)

age_limit.age_details: Must be able to speak, read, and write in Telugu and English.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the IBPS portal, accessible via the official Stree Nidhi website https://www.streenidhi.telangana.gov.in under the "Careers" section. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal will be active from 09-05-2026 (00:00 Hrs) to 29-05-2026 (24:00 Hrs). Candidates must apply only for their native district — applications for a different district will not be considered.
